data.title: Foodtastic acquires Central Social Hall, a Canadian casual dining brand, to strengthen its portfolio. Founded in 2012 by Rota and Kupina.
data.description: Foodtastic has recently acquired Central Social Hall, a renowned Canadian premium casual dining and social hall brand established in 2012 by Jerry Rota and Jesse Kupina. This acquisition aligns with Foodtastic’s goal of incorporating prominent Canadian brands into its collection of banners, as well as broadening its presence in dining concepts suitable for daily dining and social events. Central Social Hall is recognized for its chef-led menus, specially crafted drinks, and community-centered hospitality.

data.title: Bojangles brings back the Bojangler Fish Sandwich for Lent on Feb. 23. Features crispy Alaskan Pollock filet.
data.description: In Charlotte, N.C., Bojangles is reintroducing a sought-after item that fans anticipate annually: the Bojangler® Fish Sandwich, available starting February 23. This limited-time offering, available across all outlets, features the signature bold and irresistible taste that defines Bojangles. Just in time for the Lenten period, guests can savor the crispy Alaskan Pollock filet, breaded with panko crumbs and seasoned with Bo’s Famous Sea, as they seek a seasonal seafood alternative.

data.title: IS Partners, LLC achieved ANAB accreditation for ISO/IEC 27001 certification services, expanding global audit capabilities.
data.description: In Dresher, Pennsylvania, on February 19, 2026, IS Partners, LLC revealed that it has obtained official accreditation from the ANSI National Accreditation Board (ANAB) to conduct ISO/IEC 27001 audits. IS Partners is a prominent company specializing in IT audit, cybersecurity, and compliance services. This accreditation marks a significant achievement for IS Partners and highlights its expertise in this field.

data.title: Depot Connect International sells Industrial and Rail Services to Clean Harbors for $130 million.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on February 19, 2026, Depot Connect International (DCI) declared its definitive agreement to sell its Industrial Services and Rail Services division to Clean Harbors (NYSE: CLH) for around $130 million. This deal marks a significant step for both companies as they expand their operations in the sector.

data.title: Select Medical to open a 12-bed neuro transitional center in Harrisburg, PA, the first of its kind in the area.
data.description: In Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania on February 19, 2026, Select Medical Corporation revealed its plans to establish a 12-bed rehabilitative neuro transitional center (NTC) at 3705 Elmwood Drive in Harrisburg, PA 17110. This center will be the first of its kind in the area.

data.title: Jacob Molloy overcame severe dyslexia by using science-of-reading instruction, wrote debut chapter book, and surpassed grade-level decoding at age 10.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on February 19, 2026, a remarkable student named Jacob Molloy defied expectations by achieving grade-level decoding skills and writing his first chapter book without the need for accommodations or assistive technology. At age 10, Jacob was unable to read due to severe dyslexia, but after receiving speech-to-print intervention, he has successfully surpassed grade-level reading abilities. This inspiring accomplishment showcases Jacob's determination and the effectiveness of the intervention, highlighting a significant milestone in his educational journey.
